description: ol-not-a-place (issues #79/#113): the reporter `first` used as an assignment target (`first :x = 5`) is not an assignable place. The parser recognizes the assignment structurally so the semantic checker can flag the non-place target at stage=semantic, with the FULL target surface text (reconstructed from the AST) carried as the `text` param — the exact shape spec/tooling.md:213-219's worked example mandates (spec/error-model.md, spec/grammar.md:258). The second line assigns `:x` so this fixture stays focused on `ol-not-a-place` alone, without also tripping `ol-undefined-var` on the same `:x` read.
